name: Hot Dog Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed the peppers.
2. Chop the vegetables through the medium blade of a food chopper.
3. Cover the chopped vegetables with boiling water and let stand for 15 minutes.
4. Drain the vegetables well.
5. Add the remaining ingredients to the drained vegetables.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Transfer the hot relish into jars and seal them.
